name: Hays, Mcclanahan
motto: "Ne'er shall the sun shine on such another."
description: Hays was one of our most popular young men, and was always willing and ready to do his part.

name: Pat, Hamm
description: Pat is an excellent student and an all-around athlete. In the four years of his High School training he has made use of the part that diligence is the stepping stone to success.

name: Lucile, Hogins
description: Quiet, gentle and smiling always. Lucile is one of the highest standing students in school.

name: White, Sam
description: "Stony" is little in size, but a giant in action. He is always there to do his part. Stony loves eggs.

name: Bondi, Hermoyne
description: Bond says she wouldn't take a million dollars for her trip to New York. Not the wonderful sights but the good luck that came to her—especially after returning home.

name: Justice, Norene
description: Norene intended to see Paris (Ark.), but finally moved to Fayetteville.

name: Roys, Lucile
description: Lucile excels in Home Economics. She makes good wherever she goes.

name: Baker, Alexander
description: Pete's hobby is playing the piano for the young ladies.

name: Johnson, Iris
description: Iris is little but loud, especially in Physics Lab. Wonder why she is always so glad when Wednesday comes?

name: Todd, Thomas
description: Tommy is the Comedian at "Aggie." To see Tommy "flirting" reminds us of a "flirtation" in an old folks' home.

name: Gray, Rogers
motto: "Sturdy as an elephant and swift as a deer."

name: Mikel, Clara
description: Clara is a lover of athletics but I rather think she loves athletes better—the curly-headed blonds.

name: Bishop, Joe
description: Joe is a good student; peppy and always on the hop. Joe is an orator and a Physics "shark" by birth.

name: Long, Euel
description: He is an all-around student and possesses many fine musical talents.

name: Shoptaw, Lorraine
motto: "Tis better to have loved and lost than to marry and be bossed."
description: Girls take her advice. She knows.

name: Tanner, George E.
description: G. E. is a Physics "shark." He is an A-1 student anywhere you put him.

name: Buzbee, Hugh
motto: "Oh, handsome but elusive man! How can I capture thee?"
description: We are sure "Specks" will be a success at whatever he attempts to do.

name: Dollar, Okla
description: Okla is very popular, especially with the young men. Those killing smiles and graceful steps would attract the attention of any man.

name: Loyd, Millard
description: Loyd was an excellent student. "A heart of gold, a lad of life, an imp of fame."

name: Drucilla, Weir
description: Drucilla has made a splendid student. This is her first year at "Aggie."

name: Mayo, Reed
motto: "Through the ages one increasing purpose runs, and the thoughts of men are widened with the process of the sun."

name: Harold, Spicer
description: Harold is a real "sport" and always ready to do his part in all the school activities.

name: Velma, Mcneal
motto: "If worry were the cause of death then she would live forever."

name: Emmons, Ruth (Rufus)
motto: "Well-timed silence has more excellence than speech."

name: Hill, Douglas
description: Doug seems to delight in captivating the girls just for the pleasure of skillfully eluding all their snares designed for his capture.

name: Baker, Josh
description: Josh is energetic and industrious. He isn't afraid to tackle anything. Josh makes good in all his classroom work.

name: Mckenzie, Eunice
motto: "None knew thee but to love thee."

name: Dickens, Marion
motto: "Not today is to justify me and answer what I am for."

name: Bunyon, Sands
description: Bun is one of the best students "Aggie" ever had and we hope he will be with us again next year.

name: Vance, Mary
motto: "Verily I say unto you there is not a Class Historian living who can find out who my best (?) friend is."
description: Patience is a necessary ingredient of genius.

name: Ketchside, Kenneth
description: Oh! Those pretty blushes and killing smiles. One of the "hobbies" to New York and even went to Dardanelle.

name: Sullivant, May
motto: "She looketh well to the ways of her household and eateth not the bread of idleness."

name: Mcneal, Roy
description: Roy has been with us for several years and has many friends at "Aggie."

name: Putman, Margaret
description: Margaret is one of the most popular girls in her class. Her musical talents and soft brown eyes won for her many friends.

name: Eikleberry, Murrel
motto: "He that tooteth not his own horn, the same shall not be tooted."

name: Webb, Bunyon
description: Bun is a silver-tongued and whirl-wind orator of much ability. His gentle and kind disposition has won for him many friends. 600 West Main Street.

name: Danley, Bonnie
motto: "Pretty to walk with, Witty to talk with, And pleasant to think on."

name: Russell, Garland
motto: "And still the wonder grew that one small head could carry all he knew."
description: Garland's future is bright.

name: Braselton, Veda (Vaughan)
clubs: Captain and Manager of Basketball team

name: John, Tucker
motto: "Whoever wears a happy face does service to humanity."
description: So it is with John. He not only believes in serving his fellow men, but his school, town and state.

name: Ben Frank, Pruett
clubs: Winner of individual honors at the Stock Judging contest at Little Rock last fall

name: G. W., Hamm
clubs: Assistant Business Manager and Editor of Tuba Agricola
Choir, Glee Club, Y. M. C. A.

name: Myover, James
description: Jim left us this year to try his luck in the city; he says he will join the old Aggies at the beginning of next year.

name: Webb, John Burl
description: Graduate from S. D. A., '23.

name: Allmon, Ernestine
description: Graduated Pottsville High, '23.

name: Harrell, Euna
description: College Freshmen. Graduate S. D. A.

name: Hurley, Sylvia
description: If being happy were a crime, she would get a life sentence.

name: Burnette, Lorena
description: Lorena's most treasured possession is a pet pig.

name: Clement, Chas. B.
description: Known as—"Big Foot." Favorite Pastime—Working in the Beauty Parlor. Favorite Expression—"What ye say?" Extravagance—"Feet." Destiny—Referee girls' basketball games.

name: Spicer, Ruth
description: Known as—"Ruthie." Favorite Pastime—Debating. Favorite Expression—"I say boy!" Extravagance—Knowledge. Destiny—Home Economics Instructor.

name: Smith, Charles B.
description: Known as—"C. B." Favorite Pastime—Roaming. Favorite Expression—"By Gids." Extravagance—Railroad tickets. Destiny—To have a "Stone."

name: Burkhead, Clarence C.
description: Known as—"Daddy." Favorite Pastime—Working. Favorite Expression—"I'll be glad to finish." Extravagance—"Type paper." Destiny—Farmer.

name: Strickland, Ruel
description: Known as—"Strick." Favorite Pastime—"Looking at Jimmie." Favorite Expression—"My goodness." Extravagance—"Going with women." Destiny—"Taking care of the chickens."

name: Hodges, J. T.
description: Known as—"Gazy." Favorite Pastime—Studying Soph. English. Favorite Expression—"Camelflouge." Extravagance—Skimmed milk. Destiny—"Maid."

name: Estelle, Gill
description: Known as—"Stell." Favorite Pastime—Writing letters. Favorite Expression—"Absolutely." Extravagance—Beads and ear-bobs. Destiny—To know more of an Architect.

name: Raymond, Smallwood
description: Known as—"Smallie." Favorite Pastime—Walking. Favorite Expression—"Rupert did you get a letter?" Extravagance—Beauty. Destiny—To have a girl.

name: Clyde, Jones
description: Known as—"Sargent." Favorite Pastime—Driving a Studebaker. Favorite Expression—"I'm goin' to quit her." Extravagance—Stationery and Stamps. Destiny—Hope.

name: Elmo, Lacy
description: Known as—"Runt." Favorite Pastime—Cleaning Dairy Barns. Favorite Expression—"I'm a woman hater." Extravagance—Brains. Destiny—To be a singer.

name: Virgil, Highfill
description: Known as—"Slim." Favorite Pastime—Watching the girls. Favorite Expression—"Nothin' doin'." Extravagance—Work. Destiny—Stout old man.

name: Fanny, Russell
description: Known as—"Grandma." Favorite Pastime—Getting Back at Garland. Favorite Expression—"I'll shoot you with a popgun." Extravagance—Kissing. Destiny—Old Maid.

name: Alcie, Oldham
description: Known as—"Jumbo." Favorite Pastime—Talking to Scientist. Favorite Expression—"Oh, girls!" Extravagance—Bright Head. Destiny—Musician.

name: Russell, H. Clark
description: Known as—"Russ." Favorite Pastime—Studying (It's a Joke.) Favorite Expression—"My character is spotless." Extravagance—Money. Destiny—Artist.

name: Kenneth, Nothwang
description: Favorite Pastime—Wearing out "West's" chairs. Favorite Expression—"Oh, that's quite different." Extravagance—Love. Destiny—"Bankruptcy."

name: Helen, Paxton
description: Favorite Pastime—"Booker." Favorite Expression—"I'll stay neutral." Destiny—Housekeeper.

name: Faye, Mccullough
description: Favorite Pastime—Writing poetry. Favorite Expression—"It's Russell." Extravagance—"Height." Destiny—Y. W. C. A. worker.

name: Joseph, W. Burton
description: Favorite Pastime—Loafing. Favorite Expression—"I'll say, fellows." Extravagance—Buying Cob Pipes. Destiny—"A great business man."

name: Annie, Marie Parks
description: Favorite Pastime—"Studying." Favorite Expression—"Oh, isn't that terrible!" Extravagance—Hair nets. Destiny—To go home.

name: Clyde, R. Magness
description: Favorite Pastime—Feeding hogs. Favorite Expression—"I can't; I have to study." Extravagance—Grade averages. Destiny—Bookworm.

name: Lillie, Wilkins
description: Favorite Pastime—Studying English. Favorite Expression—"Good!" Extravagance—Talking. Destiny—To be a teacher.

name: Septer, Paul
description: Favorite Pastime—Loafing. Favorite Expression—"Mamma Love Papa." Extravagance—Show tickets for Ozelma. Destiny—Hogs.

name: Edwards, Pauline
description: Favorite Pastime—Planning the future. Favorite Expression—"Girls, I wouldn't say that." Extravagance—"Size." Destiny—"School Ma'am."

name: Reed, Johnnie
description: Favorite Pastime—Playing the piano. Extravagance—Gum. Destiny—Basketball coach.

name: Lynch, Fred A.
description: Favorite Pastime—Boasting. Favorite Expression—"Ah, shucks!" Extravagance—Trombones. Destiny—Failure.

name: Crouse, Dorothy
description: Favorite Pastime—Chewing gum. Favorite Expression—"You can't kid me." Extravagance—Curling irons. Destiny—Powers.

name: Cummins, Levi
description: Favorite Pastime—"Working." Ha! Favorite Expression—"I'll never grow old." Extravagance—Cattle Books. Destiny—Stock raiser.

name: Willis, Rena
description: Favorite Pastime—Teasing. Favorite Expression—"Good night!" Extravagance—"Hershey Bars." Destiny—Have fun.

name: Varnelle, Overbey
description: Known as—"John." Favorite Pastime—"Caroling." Favorite Expression—"Well, I'll say." Extravagance—Mowers. Destiny—Lamar.

name: Troy, Caviness
description: Known as—"Pete." Favorite Pastime—Nothing. Favorite Expression—"I am sleepy; Git to hell out of here." Extravagance—Nothing at all. Destiny—Farmer.

name: Ira, Mccollum
description: Known as—"Red." Favorite Pastime—Cooking beans. Favorite Expression—"Shore nuff?" Extravagance—"Prunes." Destiny—"Fourteen."

name: Rupert, Bonds
description: Known as—"Fairy Tales." Favorite Pastime—"Boasting." Favorite Expression—"Have you a date tonight?" Extravagance—"Wine, women and jazz." Destiny—Wanting a date with Dot Sullivan.

name: Harry C., Liles
description: Known as—"Chubby." Favorite Pastime—Playing marbles. Favorite Expression—"Bye, girls." Extravagance—"Farms." Destiny—Constable.

name: Vera, Davis
description: Known as—"Tap." Favorite Pastime—"Primping." Favorite Expression—"I can't eat this stuff." Extravagance—Football sweaters. Destiny—To have a "Hamm."

name: Mamie, Dawson
description: Known as—"Shortie." Favorite Pastime—Flirting. Favorite Expression—"That gets me down." Extravagance—"Lip Stick." Destiny—"Someone's darling."

name: Dorothy, Freeman
description: Known as—"Dorcie." Favorite Pastime—"Eating mustard." Favorite Expression—"Land sakes!" Extravagance—Loving. Destiny—Cook in Home Bakery.
